role_summary: the investment analyst evaluates investment opportunities and supports portfolio decisions  through research and financial modeling.
responsibilities: • analyze financial performance of companies and sec tors  • build financial models and valuation reports   • conduct market, industry, and risk analysis   • support investment decisions and recommendations   • track portfolio performance and market trends   • prepare investment presentations and reports   skills & qualification s:  • qualified ca   • strong financial modeling and valuation skills   • knowledge of capital markets and investments
